title: AI Miniature Train Set
description: Turns a photo into a detailed model railway miniature scene.
positive_prompt: Transform the input photo into a detailed miniature model railway scene. Preserve the main layout, number of people, recognizable identity cues, pose, camera angle, clothing colors, and environment context as tiny scale-model figures and scenery. Add tilt-shift depth, model buildings, miniature tracks where appropriate, painted terrain, tabletop lighting, and crafted hobby-detail realism.
negative_prompt: text, captions, logos, watermarks, changed identity, extra people, distorted faces, malformed figures, duplicate limbs, full-size realism, messy scale, low quality, blurry, toy chaos, unreadable signage
custom_prompt_placeholder: e.g. model railway town, tilt-shift miniature...
